mapper.select: SELECT instance_id FROM monitor_instance ORDER BY instance_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO memory_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, relname, relkind, buffers, dirty_buffers, pinned_buffers, heap_blks_read, heap_blks_hit, idx_blks_read, idx_blks_hit, avg_usagecount, max_usagecount, min_usagecount, database_name, temp_files, temp_bytes, blk_read_time, blk_write_time ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{relname}, #{relkind}, #{buffers}, #{dirtyBuffers}, #{pinnedBuffers}, #{heapBlksRead}, #{heapBlksHit}, #{idxBlksRead}, #{idxBlksHit}, #{avgUsagecount}, #{maxUsagecount}, #{minUsagecount}, #{databaseName}, #{tempFiles}, #{tempBytes}, #{blkReadTime}, #{blkWriteTime} )

INSERT INTO memory_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, relname, relkind, buffers, dirty_buffers, pinned_buffers, heap_blks_read, heap_blks_hit, idx_blks_read, idx_blks_hit, avg_usagecount, max_usagecount, min_usagecount, database_name, temp_files, temp_bytes, blk_read_time, blk_write_time ) VALUES
( #{item.instanceId}, #{item.collectedAt}, #{item.relname}, #{item.relkind}, #{item.buffers}, #{item.dirtyBuffers}, #{item.pinnedBuffers}, #{item.heapBlksRead}, #{item.heapBlksHit}, #{item.idxBlksRead}, #{item.idxBlksHit}, #{item.avgUsagecount}, #{item.maxUsagecount}, #{item.minUsagecount}, #{item.databaseName}, #{item.tempFiles}, #{item.tempBytes}, #{item.blkReadTime}, #{item.blkWriteTime} )

INSERT INTO memory_agg_1m ( instance_id, collected_at, relname, relkind, avg_buffers, avg_buffer_usage_pct, avg_dirty_ratio, avg_pinned_buffers, delta_heap_blks_read, delta_heap_blks_hit, delta_idx_blks_read, delta_idx_blks_hit, cache_hit_ratio, avg_usagecount, buffer_reuse_score, database_name, delta_temp_files, delta_temp_bytes, temp_file_rate, temp_bytes_per_sec, delta_blk_read_time, delta_blk_write_time, avg_io_wait_time_ms, status ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{relname}, #{relkind}, #{avgBuffers}, #{avgBufferUsagePct}, #{avgDirtyRatio}, #{avgPinnedBuffers}, #{deltaHeapBlksRead}, #{deltaHeapBlksHit}, #{deltaIdxBlksRead}, #{deltaIdxBlksHit}, #{cacheHitRatio}, #{avgUsagecount}, #{bufferReuseScore}, #{databaseName}, #{deltaTempFiles}, #{deltaTempBytes}, #{tempFileRate}, #{tempBytesPerSec}, #{deltaBlkReadTime}, #{deltaBlkWriteTime}, #{avgIoWaitTimeMs}, #{status} )

INSERT INTO memory_agg_1m ( instance_id, collected_at, relname, relkind, avg_buffers, avg_buffer_usage_pct, avg_dirty_ratio, avg_pinned_buffers, delta_heap_blks_read, delta_heap_blks_hit, delta_idx_blks_read, delta_idx_blks_hit, cache_hit_ratio, avg_usagecount, buffer_reuse_score, database_name, delta_temp_files, delta_temp_bytes, temp_file_rate, temp_bytes_per_sec, delta_blk_read_time, delta_blk_write_time, avg_io_wait_time_ms, status ) VALUES
( #{item.instanceId}, #{item.collectedAt}, #{item.relname}, #{item.relkind}, #{item.avgBuffers}, #{item.avgBufferUsagePct}, #{item.avgDirtyRatio}, #{item.avgPinnedBuffers}, #{item.deltaHeapBlksRead}, #{item.deltaHeapBlksHit}, #{item.deltaIdxBlksRead}, #{item.deltaIdxBlksHit}, #{item.cacheHitRatio}, #{item.avgUsagecount}, #{item.bufferReuseScore}, #{item.databaseName}, #{item.deltaTempFiles}, #{item.deltaTempBytes}, #{item.tempFileRate}, #{item.tempBytesPerSec}, #{item.deltaBlkReadTime}, #{item.deltaBlkWriteTime}, #{item.avgIoWaitTimeMs}, #{item.status} )

INSERT INTO memory_agg_5m ( instance_id, time_bucket, relname, relkind, avg_buffers, avg_buffer_usage_pct, avg_dirty_ratio, avg_pinned_buffers, total_heap_blks_read, total_heap_blks_hit, total_idx_blks_read, total_idx_blks_hit, avg_cache_hit_ratio, avg_usagecount, avg_buffer_reuse_score, database_name, total_temp_files, total_temp_bytes, avg_temp_file_rate, avg_temp_bytes_per_sec, total_blk_read_time, total_blk_write_time, avg_io_wait_time_ms, record_count ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{timeBucket}, #{relname}, #{relkind}, #{avgBuffers}, #{avgBufferUsagePct}, #{avgDirtyRatio}, #{avgPinnedBuffers}, #{totalHeapBlksRead}, #{totalHeapBlksHit}, #{totalIdxBlksRead}, #{totalIdxBlksHit}, #{avgCacheHitRatio}, #{avgUsagecount}, #{avgBufferReuseScore}, #{databaseName}, #{totalTempFiles}, #{totalTempBytes}, #{avgTempFileRate}, #{avgTempBytesPerSec}, #{totalBlkReadTime}, #{totalBlkWriteTime}, #{avgIoWaitTimeMs}, #{recordCount} ) ON CONFLICT (instance_id, time_bucket, relname) DO UPDATE SET relkind = EXCLUDED.relkind, avg_buffers = EXCLUDED.avg_buffers, avg_buffer_usage_pct = EXCLUDED.avg_buffer_usage_pct, avg_dirty_ratio = EXCLUDED.avg_dirty_ratio, avg_pinned_buffers = EXCLUDED.avg_pinned_buffers, total_heap_blks_read = EXCLUDED.total_heap_blks_read, total_heap_blks_hit = EXCLUDED.total_heap_blks_hit, total_idx_blks_read = EXCLUDED.total_idx_blks_read, total_idx_blks_hit = EXCLUDED.total_idx_blks_hit, avg_cache_hit_ratio = EXCLUDED.avg_cache_hit_ratio, avg_usagecount = EXCLUDED.avg_usagecount, avg_buffer_reuse_score = EXCLUDED.avg_buffer_reuse_score, database_name = EXCLUDED.database_name, total_temp_files = EXCLUDED.total_temp_files, total_temp_bytes = EXCLUDED.total_temp_bytes, avg_temp_file_rate = EXCLUDED.avg_temp_file_rate, avg_temp_bytes_per_sec = EXCLUDED.avg_temp_bytes_per_sec, total_blk_read_time = EXCLUDED.total_blk_read_time, total_blk_write_time = EXCLUDED.total_blk_write_time, avg_io_wait_time_ms = EXCLUDED.avg_io_wait_time_ms, record_count = EXCLUDED.record_count
mapper.select: -- memory_agg_1m 테이블에서 최근 데이터 조회 SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(avg_buffer_usage_pct) AS NUMERIC), 2) as value, SUM(avg_buffers) as usedBuffers, -- 전체 버퍼 수는 최신 데이터에서 가져오기 (서브쿼리 수정) (SELECT buffers FROM memory_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1) as totalBuffers FROM memory_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

-- memory_agg_1m 테이블에서 최근 Hit 비율 조회 SELECT ROUND(CAST(AVG(avg_hit_ratio) AS NUMERIC), 2) as value, SUM(total_heap_blks_hit) as hitCount, SUM(total_heap_blks_hit + total_heap_blks_read) as totalCount FROM memory_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

-- Shared Buffer 사용량 조회 SELECT ROUND(CAST(AVG(avg_buffer_usage_pct) AS NUMERIC), 2) as value, SUM(avg_buffers) as activeBuffers, (SELECT buffers FROM memory_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1) as totalBuffers FROM memory_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

-- 시간대별 eviction rate 계산 SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, total_eviction_count as eviction_count FROM memory_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

-- 시간대별 fsync rate -- bgwriter나 checkpoint 테이블에서 가져와야 함 SELECT TO_CHAR(b.collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, b.total_backend_fsync as fsync_count FROM bgwriter_agg_1m b WHERE b.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND b.collected_at >= #{startTime} AND b.collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY b.collected_at

-- 시간대별 dirty buffer 추세 SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, ROUND(CAST(AVG(avg_dirty_ratio) AS NUMERIC), 2) as dirty_ratio FROM memory_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI'), collected_at ORDER BY collected_at

-- Eviction vs Fsync 비교 SELECT TO_CHAR(m.collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, m.total_eviction_count as evictions, b.total_backend_fsync as fsyncs FROM memory_agg_1m m LEFT JOIN bgwriter_agg_1m b ON m.instance_id = b.instance_id AND DATE_TRUNC('hour', m.collected_at) = DATE_TRUNC('hour', b.collected_at) WHERE m.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND m.collected_at >= #{startTime} AND m.collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY m.collected_at

WITH total_buffers AS ( SELECT SUM(avg_buffers) as total FROM memory_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ) SELECT relname as object_name, CASE relkind WHEN 'r' THEN 'table' WHEN 'i' THEN 'index' ELSE 'other' END as object_type, ROUND( CAST( (avg_buffers * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM total_buffers), 0)) AS NUMERIC ), 2 ) as buffer_count FROM memory_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ORDER BY avg_buffers DESC LIMIT #{limit}

-- 최근 요약 통계 SELECT ROUND(CAST(AVG(avg_dirty_ratio) AS NUMERIC), 2) as dirtyBufferRatio, -- Backend 대기 시간은 bgwriter나 session 테이블에서 가져와야 함 0.0 as backendWaitTime, -- Work Memory는 별도 수집 필요 0.0 as workMemUsage, -- Temp File Usage는 별도 수집 필요 0.0 as tempFileUsage, -- Checkpoint 간격은 checkpoint 테이블에서 가져와야 함 0.0 as checkpointInterval FROM memory_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

-- Memory 객체 리스트 SELECT memory_agg_id as id, relname as objectName, CASE relkind WHEN 'r' THEN 'table' WHEN 'i' THEN 'index' ELSE 'other' END as type, -- 크기는 pg_relation_size로 별도 계산 필요 0.0 as sizeMb, avg_buffers as bufferCount, ROUND(CAST(avg_buffer_usage_pct AS NUMERIC), 2) as usagePercent, -- Dirty count는 raw 테이블에서 가져와야 함 (SELECT dirty_buffers FROM memory_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND relname = memory_agg_1m.relname ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1) as dirtyCount, ROUND(CAST(avg_dirty_ratio AS NUMERIC), 2) as dirtyPercent, ROUND(CAST(avg_pinned_buffers AS NUMERIC), 0) as pinnedBuffers, ROUND(CAST(avg_hit_ratio AS NUMERIC), 2) as hitPercent, total_access_count as accessCount, total_eviction_count as evictionCount, ROUND(CAST(avg_access_time_ms AS NUMERIC), 2) as avgAccessTime, status FROM memory_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'
AND relkind IN
'r'
'i'
AND status IN
#{status}
ORDER BY avg_buffers DESC

SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(buffer_hit_ratio)::numeric, 2), 0) as cache_hit_ratio, COALESCE(SUM(delta_blks_hit), 0) as total_cache_hits, COALESCE(SUM(delta_blks_read), 0) as total_physical_reads FROM disk_io_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} AND database_name IS NOT NULL

SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(temp_file_rate)::numeric, 2), 0) as temp_file_rate, COALESCE(SUM(delta_temp_files), 0) as total_temp_files, COALESCE(SUM(delta_temp_bytes), 0) as total_temp_bytes FROM memory_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND database_name IS NOT NULL AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime}

SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(buffer_hit_ratio)::numeric, 2), 0) as cache_hit_ratio FROM disk_io_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} AND database_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI'), collected_at ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at, COALESCE(SUM(delta_temp_files), 0) as total_temp_files, COALESCE(SUM(delta_temp_bytes), 0) as total_temp_bytes FROM memory_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} AND database_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY collected_at ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at, COALESCE(SUM(delta_blk_read_time), 0) as total_blk_read_time, COALESCE(SUM(delta_blk_write_time), 0) as total_blk_write_time FROM memory_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} GROUP BY collected_at ORDER BY collected_at

WITH buffer_usage AS ( SELECT relname, ROUND(AVG(avg_buffers)::numeric, 0) as avg_buffers, ROUND(AVG(avg_buffer_usage_pct)::numeric, 2) as buffer_usage_percent FROM memory_agg_5m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND time_bucket >= #{startTime} AND time_bucket <= #{endTime} AND relname IS NOT NULL GROUP BY relname ) SELECT relname, avg_buffers, buffer_usage_percent FROM buffer_usage ORDER BY avg_buffers DESC LIMIT 10

WITH cache_hit_aggregated AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cache_hit_ratio ASC) as rank_num, relname, database_name, ROUND(AVG(cache_hit_ratio)::numeric, 2) as cache_hit_ratio, COALESCE(SUM(delta_heap_blks_read + delta_idx_blks_read), 0) as physical_reads, COALESCE(SUM(delta_heap_blks_hit + delta_idx_blks_hit), 0) as cache_hits, CASE WHEN AVG(cache_hit_ratio) < 85 THEN '위험' WHEN AVG(cache_hit_ratio) < 95 THEN '주의' ELSE '정상' END as status FROM memory_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} AND relname IS NOT NULL GROUP BY relname, database_name ) SELECT rank_num, relname, database_name, cache_hit_ratio, physical_reads, cache_hits, status FROM cache_hit_aggregated <where> <if test="statusList != null and statusList.size() > 0"> AND status IN <foreach collection="statusList" item="status" open="(" separator="," close=")"> #{status} </foreach> </if> </where> ORDER BY cache_hit_ratio ASC LIMIT 20

SELECT time_bucket, COALESCE(SUM(total_temp_files), 0) as total_temp_files, COALESCE(SUM(total_temp_bytes), 0) as total_temp_bytes FROM memory_agg_5m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND time_bucket >= #{startTime} AND time_bucket <= #{endTime} AND database_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket DESC LIMIT #{limit}
